info.title: Snipp.gg Relay API
info.description: First-party Snipp API for the full user experience. Includes uploads, posts, discover, likes, comments, blocks, and profile management.

servers.description: Default. Proxied and load-balanced through Cloudflare. Capped at 100 MB per upload.
EU West regional endpoint. Unproxied, no 100 MB upload cap.
US West regional endpoint. Unproxied, no 100 MB upload cap.

get.description: Retrieve user profile data. Includes badge flags and a `badges` object (ordered as `verified`, `staff`, `partner`, `bugHunterTier`, `translator`, `plus`). For non-self requests, public profile uploads are included by default as `publicUploads`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User ID or `@me` for the authenticated user

parameters.name: includePosts
parameters.description: Include `publicUploads` in the response. Defaults to `true` for non-self requests and `false` for `@me`.

parameters.name: postsLimit
parameters.description: Maximum number of `publicUploads` to return (1-50, default 50).

401.description: Unauthorized. No relay-key header or invalid relay key.

get.description: Fetch a post by its share code. Returns the post's metadata including its direct file URL, title, description, privacy level, and creation date. Private posts are only visible to the owner.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The share code of the post

url.description: Direct URL to the primary file

urls.description: Ordered list of all file URLs. Only present on albums (more than one file).

isAlbum.description: True when the post contains more than one file.

files.description: Per-file metadata. Use `fileName` to address a file in /deleteUpload.

width.description: File width in pixels. Present per file when known; absent for older uploads.

height.description: File height in pixels. Present per file when known; absent for older uploads.

mime_type.description: File MIME type. Present per file when known; absent for older uploads.

size.description: File size in bytes. Present per file when known; absent for older uploads.

size_formatted.description: Human-readable file size. Present when size is known.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to a generated thumbnail still frame. Present for video posts; signed (24-hour expiry) for private posts.

views.description: Total view count for the post (auto-incremented on this request when applicable).

liked.description: Whether the requesting user has liked this post.

author.description: The post's uploader. Null if the user has been deleted.

avatar.description: Avatar URL, or null if unset.

plus.description: Whether the author has Snipp PLUS.

priority.description: True when the post's video is served over priority delivery, false for standard delivery.

file.description: File metadata. May be absent for older uploads.

dimensions.description: Image dimensions. Only present for images and GIFs.

moderated.description: Present and true when the post has been moderated

post.description: Upload 1-9 image or video files. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, MP4, MOV, and MKV. Every upload automatically creates a post. When sending multiple files, they are grouped into an album by default. File size limits depend on your plan. See [Plans](/concepts/plans) for details.

parameters.name: post-privacy
parameters.description: Privacy for the generated post: private (default), unlisted (accessible via link), or public (visible on Discover)

parameters.name: post-title
parameters.description: Post title (max 30 characters)

parameters.name: post-description
parameters.description: Post description (max 200 characters)

parameters.name: post-type
parameters.description: Only relevant when uploading 2+ files. `album` (default) groups all files into a single album post. `individual` creates a separate post per file.

parameters.name: include-metadata
parameters.description: By default, Snipp strips metadata (camera, GPS location, timestamp) to protect your privacy: EXIF from PNG, JPG, and WebP images, and container metadata from videos during the MP4 remux. Set to `true` to keep the original metadata.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Eligible videos use priority (adaptive bitrate) streaming by default, spending your priority minutes. Set to `false` to upload in standard quality instead and save your minutes. The post's `priority` field reflects whether the video ended up on adaptive streaming.

file.description: 1-9 image or video files. Use multiple `file` fields for multi-file uploads.

200.description: Upload successful. Response shape depends on whether 1 or multiple files were uploaded.

url.description: Direct URL to the uploaded file

priority.description: `true` when the upload is a video placed on priority (adaptive) streaming.

post.description: Album mode returns `code`/`url`/`isAlbum`/`fileCount`. Individual mode returns `posts` array.

priority.description: Album mode: `true` when any file in the album is a video placed on priority (adaptive) streaming.

400.description: No file, unsupported type, or all files failed

413.description: File exceeds your plan's size limit

get.description: List your uploads, newest first. Returns all by default. Pass `?limit=N` to cap the response (max 1000).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum uploads to return (1-1000). Omit for all.

code.description: Associated share code when a post exists

isAlbum.description: Whether the upload belongs to an album post

title.description: Post title, or null when none is set

priority.description: True when the post's video is served over priority delivery, false for standard delivery.

403.description: No permission to access recent uploads

delete.description: Delete an uploaded file by filename.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Filename (32 hex chars + extension, e.g. a1b2c3d4e5f6...png)

patch.description: Edit an existing upload's title, description, or privacy level. You must own the upload.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The share code of the upload to edit

parameters.name: post-privacy
parameters.description: New privacy level

title.description: New title (max 30 characters). Send empty string to clear. Use a form field rather than a header so emoji and accented characters are preserved.

description.description: New description (max 200 characters). Send empty string to clear. Use a form field rather than a header so emoji and accented characters are preserved.

400.description: Invalid parameters or no fields to update

403.description: No permission to edit uploads, not the owner, post is moderated, or post is restricted and cannot be made public

post.description: Add one or more files to an existing album post (max 9 files total). New files inherit the post's privacy. You must own the post.

parameters.name: post-code
parameters.description: The share code of the post to append to

parameters.name: include-metadata
parameters.description: By default, Snipp strips metadata (camera, GPS location, timestamp) to protect your privacy: EXIF from PNG, JPG, and WebP images, and container metadata from videos during the MP4 remux. Set to `true` to keep the original metadata.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Appended videos use priority (adaptive) streaming by default, spending your priority minutes. Set to `false` to add them in standard quality instead. The post's `priority` field reflects whether any file in the album is on adaptive streaming.

file.description: 1 or more image or video files. Use multiple `file` fields for multi-file appends. Total file count after append cannot exceed 9.

fileCount.description: Total files in the album after append

priority.description: `true` when any file in the album is a video on priority (adaptive) streaming.

url.description: Direct URL. Signed with a 24-hour expiry if the post is private.

400.description: Missing/invalid post-code, no file, album already full, would exceed 9-file cap, or all files failed

403.description: Account suspended, no permission to modify uploads, not the owner, or post is moderated

413.description: File exceeds your plan's size limit

get.description: Get public uploads for the discover feed. Returns up to 50 items. Blocked users are filtered both ways. Hits to this endpoint also count views toward each returned post (deduplicated per IP and post: 3 per hour).

views.description: Total view count for the post (auto-incremented on this request when applicable).

priority.description: True when the post's video is served over priority delivery, false for standard delivery.

get.description: Returns the list of users you have blocked.

post.description: Block a user by ID. Blocking is bidirectional in effect. Blocking an already-blocked user succeeds without error.

400.description: Invalid target or cannot block yourself

post.description: Unblock a user by ID. Unblocking a user who is not blocked succeeds without error.
Follow a user by ID. Following an already-followed user succeeds without error. You cannot follow yourself, suspended users, or users who have blocked you (or whom you have blocked).

400.description: Invalid target or cannot follow yourself

post.description: Unfollow a user by ID, or remove one of your own followers. Exactly one of `targetId` or `removeFollower` must be provided. If both are present, `removeFollower` takes precedence.

removeFollower.description: The follower user ID to remove from your followers

get.description: Return the list of users following the given profile. Capped at 200 results, newest first. Suspended users are excluded.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User ID whose followers to list. Defaults to the authenticated user.

get.description: Return the list of users a given profile is following. Capped at 200 results, newest first. Suspended users are excluded.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: User ID whose following list to fetch. Defaults to the authenticated user.

post.description: Like a post. Calling it twice removes the like.

shareCode.description: The share code of the post

403.description: Cannot like (suspended, moderated, or blocked by author)

get.description: List comments on a post. Pass `shareCode` as a query parameter or `code` as a header.

parameters.name: shareCode
parameters.description: The share code of the post

post.description: Add a comment to a post. Comments are limited to 200 characters. A post holds up to 500 comments.

400.description: Invalid input or post comment cap reached

403.description: Cannot comment (suspended, moderated, or blocked by author)

delete.description: Delete a comment by ID. The comment author or the post owner can delete a comment.

commentId.description: The UUID of the comment to delete

403.description: Not allowed to delete this comment

patch.description: Update profile fields. Send only the fields you want to change. Avatar and banner URLs must point to your own avatars/{userId}/ or banners/{userId}/ prefix on the Snipp CDN. Use /profile/avatar or /profile/banner to upload first.

customEmbed.description: PLUS-only. Custom embed configuration for share pages.

post.description: Upload a new avatar. Multipart form upload. Image is square-cropped to the shorter side and stored under avatars/{userId}/. Accepts .png, .jpg, .webp, .gif up to 30 MB. Sets the field on your profile automatically.

Upload a new banner. Multipart form upload. Banner keeps its original aspect ratio and is stored under banners/{userId}/. Accepts .png, .jpg, .webp, .gif up to 30 MB. Sets the field on your profile automatically.

patch.description: Set your account color theme. PLUS-only. The theme is stored on your account and returned as theme on your /users/@me profile. It is never exposed on other users profiles.

theme.description: The color theme key to set.

post.description: Report a post for violating community guidelines. The post must be public and not your own. Reports are reviewed by the moderation team.

code.description: The share code of the post to report

400.description: Missing or invalid code, or reason too long

403.description: Post already moderated, reporting own post, or author has blocked you

post.description: Report a user for violating community guidelines. The user must exist and cannot be yourself. Reports are reviewed by the moderation team.

targetUserId.description: The ID of the user to report

400.description: Missing or invalid user, or reason too long

403.description: User already suspended, reporting yourself, or the user has blocked you

get.description: Returns the region serving the request. Useful for confirming which regional endpoint you hit, or for inspecting how `relay.snipp.gg` routed you. No authentication required.

region.description: Short region code, for example `eu-west-1` or `us-west-1`. `unknown` if unset.

country.description: Country name mapped from the region code. Omitted if no mapping is available.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's daily upload activity for the last 365 days, plus aggregate stats. This is the data behind the Upload Activity heatmap in the Snipp Console, exposed so you can rebuild it yourself. Days with no uploads are omitted from `history`.

history.description: Per-day upload activity, ascending by date. Only days with at least one upload are included.

bytes.description: Total bytes uploaded on this day.

count.description: Number of files uploaded on this day.

totalBytes.description: Total bytes uploaded across the window.

totalUploads.description: Total files uploaded across the window.

activeDays.description: Number of days with at least one upload.

currentStreak.description: Consecutive days with uploads ending today (UTC).

biggestDay.description: The single day with the most bytes uploaded. `null` if there is no activity.

windowDays.description: Size of the history window in days (always 365).

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's own analytics: posts, uploads, data uploaded, comments received, likes received and followers gained over time, plus lifetime totals. This is the data behind the Analytics page in the Snipp Console, exposed so you can rebuild it yourself. Requires an active Plus subscription. All dates are UTC.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Window in days for the series and deltas. One of 7, 30, 90, 365. Defaults to 30 if omitted or invalid.

buckets.description: Today, last 7 days and last 30 days totals for each metric.

views.description: Total views across all your posts.

comments.description: Total comments received on your posts.

likes.description: Total likes received on your posts.

series.description: Daily values over the selected range. Each array has one entry per day, oldest first.

deltas.description: Current range window vs the preceding window of equal length.

current.description: Total for the current range window.

previous.description: Total for the preceding window of equal length.

change.description: Fractional change vs the previous window. `null` when the previous window was zero.

current.description: Total for the current range window.

previous.description: Total for the preceding window of equal length.

change.description: Fractional change vs the previous window. `null` when the previous window was zero.

current.description: Total for the current range window.

previous.description: Total for the preceding window of equal length.

change.description: Fractional change vs the previous window. `null` when the previous window was zero.

current.description: Total for the current range window.

previous.description: Total for the preceding window of equal length.

change.description: Fractional change vs the previous window. `null` when the previous window was zero.

current.description: Total for the current range window.

previous.description: Total for the preceding window of equal length.

change.description: Fractional change vs the previous window. `null` when the previous window was zero.

current.description: Total for the current range window.

previous.description: Total for the preceding window of equal length.

change.description: Fractional change vs the previous window. `null` when the previous window was zero.

current.description: Total for the current range window.

previous.description: Total for the preceding window of equal length.

change.description: Fractional change vs the previous window. `null` when the previous window was zero.

payout.description: Creator payout estimate for the current calendar month, partners only.

eligible.description: `true` only for partners. `false` otherwise, with no other payout fields.

payout.description: Estimated dollar share of the creator pool this month. Live estimate, may change as engagement changes.

series.description: Daily payout score for the current month, oldest first.

403.description: Forbidden. The account is suspended or is not a Plus subscriber.

Badges.description: Badge map used by profile surfaces. Order matches website profile rendering.

bugHunterTier.description: Bug hunter badge tier. 0 is no badge, 1 is Bug Hunter, 2 is Elite Bug Hunter.
Bug hunter badge tier. 0 is no badge, 1 is Bug Hunter, 2 is Elite Bug Hunter.

customEmbed.description: PLUS-only custom embed settings for share pages.

followerCount.description: Number of users following this account.

followingCount.description: Number of accounts this user follows.

theme.description: Your selected color theme. Self-only field. null if unset.

UserSubscription.description: Current subscription / plan lifecycle for the authenticated user. Self-only field.

status.description: Subscription status. `gifted` means the plan came from a redeemed code or admin comp. `null` for free users.

started_at.description: When the paid subscription began. `null` for free or gifted plans.

expires_at.description: When access ends or, for renewing subscriptions, the next billing date. `null` means no fixed expiry.

cancel_at_period_end.description: True when the user has canceled but still has access until `expires_at`. Always false for gifted plans.

gifted.description: True when the current plan comes from a redeemed gift code or admin-applied comp.

UserLimits.description: Plan limits and current weekly storage usage. Self-only field.

maxFileSize.description: Maximum size per file in bytes. 50 MB on free. `null` on plus and enterprise (no per-file limit; only weekly quota applies).

usage.description: Weekly usage limit state. The window is a fixed 7-day period anchored to your first upload after each reset, and fully resets once 7 days pass.

used.description: Bytes uploaded in the current window.

limit.description: Total bytes allowed per window. 2 GB free, 20 GB plus, 50 GB enterprise.

usedPercent.description: Fraction of the window used, `used` over `limit`.

windowStart.description: ISO timestamp when the current window started. `null` if you have never uploaded or the previous window expired without activity.

windowEnd.description: ISO timestamp when the current window ends and usage resets. `null` if `windowStart` is `null`.

resetsInSeconds.description: Seconds until the current window resets. `null` if `windowStart` is `null`.

blockedByYou.description: Whether you have blocked this user. Only present on non-self profiles.

following.description: Whether you (the requesting user) follow this user. Only present on non-self profiles.

relayKeyAuth.name: relay-key
relayKeyAuth.description: Your Relay key from the Snipp Console
